home.role: I help businesses build web tools that actually solve problems
home.description: 8+ years building end-to-end web applications independently. Currently building AI-powered products — RAG systems and LLM-powered features.

about.title: About Me
about.careerDesc: My journey in tech started in 2018, building websites with native PHP and Bootstrap templates. In 2019 I adopted my first framework, CodeIgniter 3. By late 2021 I transitioned to Laravel, and in early 2022 I began building production applications with it. Mid-2022 I dove into frontend development with React — and the Laravel + React stack has been my primary toolkit ever since.
about.skillsDesc: As a solo developer, I build full-stack web applications from start to finish — handling both backend architecture and frontend interfaces independently. My core stack includes React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Laravel. I'm comfortable working across the entire stack, from designing database schemas and building REST APIs to crafting responsive, modern user interfaces.
about.experienceDesc: Developed various web applications for government and education clients. Handling projects from school management systems, public information platforms, to REST APIs for administrative applications.
about.methodologyDesc: I take a just-in-time learning approach to my work — I learn what's needed for the project at hand, rather than trying to master everything upfront. This keeps me efficient and focused on delivering value. I believe in clear communication, clean code, and good documentation to ensure smooth project handover and future maintenance.
about.hobbiesDesc: Outside of work, I enjoy self-directed learning — exploring new technologies, reading documentation, and following the latest trends in web development. I tend to be a passive member in developer communities, preferring to read and learn from others' discussions rather than actively participating. I believe in continuously improving my skills through hands-on practice and independent study.
about.learningDesc: I'm currently exploring AI-assisted development — not just writing prompts and accepting results, but critically reviewing AI-generated code against my own understanding. I only apply AI where I already grasp the underlying concepts. Beyond that, I'm learning to integrate AI LLMs into applications and building my roadmap toward becoming an AI Product Engineer.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A collection of projects I've worked on, from government service systems, school management, to REST APIs for internal applications.
projects.clientDesc: Professional work delivered for clients and organizations.
projects.personalDesc: Side projects and tools I built for fun and learning.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.heading: Contact me for project discussions or collaboration opportunities
contact.description: I'm always open to hearing about new projects and job opportunities. Feel free to reach out through the channels below.
